dashboard.title: My Projects
dashboard.createFirst: Create your first project to get started
dashboard.welcomeDesc: Your strategic consultant with AI council. Create your first project to get started.
dashboard.useCase1Desc: From idea to structured plan. Nexo extracts your vision and composes the deliverables you need to launch.
dashboard.useCase2Desc: Define the next move with your AI council. Analyze options, identify risks, and make decisions with clarity.
dashboard.useCase3Desc: Put an idea or market to debate. Your council analyzes from multiple angles before you invest time or capital.
dashboard.gestiona: Manage your different paths and the progress of each of your ventures.

project.entryLevelQ: Where are you with your project?

council.title: Your Council
council.generating: Nexo is assembling your specialized council...

support.title: Aria · Reason Assistant
support.subtitle: Reason Assistant
support.greeting: Hi! I'm Aria. I can help you with product questions, technical issues, or register suggestions. How can I help?
support.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
support.connectionError: Couldn't connect. Check your connection and try again.

landing.heroTitle: In a world where building is cheap and change is exponential, the real advantage belongs to those who can
landing.heroSubtitle: Reason is your Strategic Reasoning Partner. Smarter decisions in a world of exponential change.
landing.problemTitle: Most strategic mistakes aren't failures of ambition.
landing.problemSubtitle: They're failures of reasoning that survive long enough to become expensive.
landing.thesisTitle1: The cost of building is collapsing
landing.thesisDesc1: When the cost of doing drops, the value of deciding rises.
landing.thesisDesc2: Hours spent on the wrong opportunity are unrecoverable.
landing.thesisDesc3: Biological intelligence alone is increasingly insufficient for the pace of modern business building.
landing.whatIsDesc: We don't sell answers. We don't sell certainty. We sell a disciplined reasoning process that improves decision quality under uncertainty.
landing.step1Desc: Tell Nexo about your project or decision. Nexo extracts the complete context.
landing.step2Desc: Reason generates an AI expert council specific to YOUR case.
landing.step3Desc: Your council debates, challenges, and builds strategic documents in real time.
landing.step4Desc: Value Proposition, Business Model, Customer Journey, Business Plan. Export as PDF and PPTX.
landing.nexoDualTitle: Every decision is debated before approval
landing.masterLine: In a world where almost anything can be built, Reason helps you decide what is actually worth building.

tour.welcomeDesc: Your Strategic Reasoning Partner. Let me quickly walk you through the main features.
tour.createProjectDesc: Each project is a strategic decision. Describe your idea or problem and Reason assembles a specialized AI council for you.
tour.balanceDesc: Every AI interaction uses tokens. Your plan includes an initial balance. You can top up anytime.
tour.supportDesc: Need help anytime? Click here. Aria can answer questions, create support tickets, or register suggestions.
